props.title: The sun shines throughout the entire day.
props.subtitle: No backend, no database. Just your content.json — and Alt+E.

props.title: Three things that make Vibe-CMS easy
props.subtitle: Fast, sleek, and without lock-in.

items.title: Instantly editable
items.description: Press Alt+E, click, type, done. No modals, no backend login.

items.title: JSON as source
items.description: All content lives in one file. Versioned, readable, portable.

items.title: Zero setup
items.description: No DB, no CMS, no login. Just your editor and the browser.

props.title: The team behind Vibe-CMS
props.subtitle: Three minds, one goal: Editing should feel good.

members.name: Lena Brunner
members.bio: Builds tools that don't get in the way for ten years.

members.name: Tobias Keller
members.bio: Believes that every good UI starts with the keyboard.

members.name: Sara Frei
members.bio: In love with white space, micro-interactions, and good typography.

props.quote: Finally a CMS that doesn’t feel like a CMS. We write the texts directly on the page — it's 100% pure fun.
props.author: Michi Mauch

props.title: Prices
props.subtitle: Three plans. Choose the one that suits you.

seo.title: Vibe-CMS — Edit directly in the browser
seo.description: A sleek landing page whose content you edit directly in the browser with Alt+E. No backend, no database, just a content.json.
